name: CMB Joint Parameter Recovery
prompt: Infer flat LCDM parameters from a synthetic CMB data summary, explain the uncertainty in H0, omega_m, omega_b, and sigma8, and justify whether a short one-shot workflow or a deeper research workflow is more reliable for this case.
domain_context: Assume a flat LCDM cosmology unless strong evidence suggests otherwise.
Reject negative density parameters and clearly flag any unphysical posterior support.
Posterior summaries should include uncertainty and note when priors dominate the result.
Document solver and inference assumptions before interpreting parameter shifts.

metadata.notes: Added to support direct one_shot vs deep_research comparison on the same target task.
